series_metadata.series_title: Office of Families & Children(OFC) Automated Systems
series_metadata.series_description: Support and maintenance services for ODJFS and county Public Chi9ldren Services Agency (PCSA) data systems for the Office of Families and Children. Support includes system design, testing, modifications and technical assistance for Statewide Automated Child Welfare Information System Project.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain in office until superseded, obsolete or replaced, then destroy., Electronic: Erase
